title: Specify deterministic mapping from question export to Plexus score configs

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
As a migration engineer, I want a procedure that consumes ai-ready question exports and creates one Plexus score per question, so that scorecard migration is deterministic and scalable.

Feature: JSON-native scorecard creation
Scenario: Build a new scorecard from ai-ready export
Given an ai-ready export JSON with questions, answers, guidelines, and optional faqs
When I run the migration procedure with target scorecard metadata
Then the procedure creates the scorecard
And creates one score per question
And updates each score with YAML code and guidelines

Scenario: Dry run planning
Given dry_run is true
When the procedure is run
Then it returns a plan and no write tools are called

Scenario: Human approval gate
Given dry_run is false
When planning and drafting complete
Then the procedure requires explicit human approval before create/update calls

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Story complete: JSON-native deterministic mapping behavior implemented with dry-run and approval gate.
